prompt: Recommend three works of fiction that you think every thoughtful adult should read at some point. Explain each in two or three sentences.
response:
Here are three works of fiction that every thoughtful adult should read at some point:

1. The Kite Runner by Khaled Hosseini: This novel follows a young boy who lives in a challenging and harsh world of uncertainty and loss. The reader will encounter his own journey of discovering the power of prayer and the significance of having a compassionate heart. This novel is a perfect combination of heart-wrenching challenges and an inspiring personal spiritual journey.

2. A Long Walk to Joy| and March  with the Fasting of the Crescent Moon by Crabb McCulloch and Hadassah Elona On two separate trips taken at different times in the same five-year period, the same individuals will visit two different locations and will remain at each location for the same amount of time. In both visits, the same individuals will encounter two separate groups of individuals (claimants). The first group of claimants will seek a ruling on the earth's time zones for the new moon for both visits. The second group of claimants will be asked to accept and confirm the ruling for the new moon for both visits.
